html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Jena’s shedding has come in waves since starting hormonal treatment, but new baby hairs show her follicles are reawakening. Because that treatment is still ongoing, this plan focuses on giving her back day‑to‑day control—anchoring sleep, calming hormonal stress, and rebuilding nutrition so each new cycle grows stronger. She’s moving from an early regrowth phase toward fuller, steadier density. With steady habits, her hair will keep shifting from fragile to flourishing. 🌱

Small daily wins now make regrowth unstoppable.
